text_original: the chat is not unlimited apparently there are a limit to the amount of free chats and once used up you have to buy more.
text_zh: 聊天显然不是无限的，免费聊天的次数是有上限的，一旦用完，你就必须购买更多。
reply_original: Hi! I understand your frustration. To be transparent, maintaining smart AI with high-quality responses involves very high server costs, which is why free messages are limited. We are working on more ways to earn free chats. For any questions or feedback, please email us at support@fantachat.ai. Thank you for your patience!
reply_zh: 你好！我非常理解您的沮丧。坦率地说，维护能够提供高质量回复的智能 AI 需要极高的服务器成本，这也是限制免费消息额度的原因。我们正在努力开发更多获取免费聊天额度的方法。如有任何问题或反馈，请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai。感谢您的耐心！
